category_sources: source_facts.description identifies NASM as an 80x86 assembler; official homepage describes NASM as the Netwide Assembler for x86 CPU architecture.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands NASM as Netwide Assembler; source_facts.homepage is the official NASM site.
docs_sources: Official NASM website provides a dedicated documentation page with online manuals for current releases.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official NASM homepage has a Repo link redirecting to github.com/netwide-assembler/nasm.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies NASM as an 80x86 assembler; official homepage describes x86 architecture support.
